title: Domain profile — per-property business-domain configuration
description: Per-property profile that tells A2 what kind of site this is and which events matter. Drives custom funnel construction at runtime (a job_board has session_start → page_view → view_search_results → job_apply; an ecommerce has session_start → view_item → add_to_cart → purchase). Without a profile, A2 falls back to source-default funnels.

profiles.description: Map of property identifier (e.g. GA4 property id 'properties/516147906') to its profile.

domain_type.description: Coarse classification driving funnel template selection and event-name heuristics.

key_engagement_events.description: Events whose presence on a session counts as 'engaged' in this domain's interpretation. For job_board: ['view_search_results','page_view','scroll']. Used by A5 for sanity checks and by A6 for funnel construction.

key_conversion_events.description: Events that represent the property's primary conversion. For joblet.ai: ['job_apply','job_apply_','job_apply_unknown']. Multiple entries handle rename variants — A2/A5 sum them as a merged total.

funnel_template.description: Ordered list of funnel steps. Each step references events by name or by tag.

page_classification.description: Optional. URL-pattern rules that classify pages into roles (e.g. '/jobs/* = job_detail', '/jobs/*/form = apply_form').

any_of.description: Multiple event names treated as the same step (e.g. apply variants).

page_filter.description: Optional pagePath filter to refine which firings count (e.g. for 'view job detail' = page_view filtered to /jobs/*).
